SHORT NAME: CLM_OP_ESRD_MTHD_CD 

LONG NAME: CLM_OP_ESRD_MTHD_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: 0 = Not ESRD 
1 = Method 1 — Home supplies purchased through a facility 
2 = Method 2 — Home supplies purchased from a supplier
